goal: A full regression across both halves of the system — property uploads and invoicing — on staging and production.
why: Milestone 9 is a handoff; the owner needs production-green proof plus a runnable script to re-verify the WhatsApp flows no automated test can drive.
success_criteria: Automated regression suites + tsc --noEmit + pnpm build run and captured in .planning/phase-3-qa-results.md, with each env-blocked/SKIP suite explained by its missing variable.
Post-deploy 8-check + API latency + access-gate behavior captured in .planning/phase-3-deploy-check.md, with protected-route redirects documented as healthy.
Console-error sweep procedure for /admin and /admin/invoices documented (gate-passing path, env var names only) or executed.

docs/admin/phase-3-regression-checklist.md provides complete, grounded, human-runnable scripts for the WhatsApp property-upload flow and the full invoice lifecycle, every step with phrase, expected reply, and DB check.

tasks.title: Run the automated regression suites + typecheck/build and capture a results report
acceptance_criteria: .planning/phase-3-qa-results.md exists with a row per suite (test, test:unit, test:edge-functions, production-readiness) listing command, exit status, and PASS/FAIL/SKIP counts.
pnpm build (Next build) result captured with success/failure.
Each SKIP/env-blocked suite names the missing env var that caused the skip, grounded in the test file.
tasks.action: Inventory each suite by reading its entry, then run npx tsc --noEmit, pnpm build, pnpm test:unit, pnpm test:edge-functions, pnpm test (Playwright), and pnpm exec tsx tests/production-readiness.test.ts, capturing stdout/stderr to the report. Record any suite that cannot start as ENV-BLOCKED with the exact missing variable and its citing line. Write a Regression verdict section.

tasks.title: Post-deploy 8-check + console-error sweep against production, captured to a report
acceptance_criteria: .planning/phase-3-deploy-check.md exists with one row per rules/deployment.md check: homepage HTTP status, auth/access-gate behavior, console errors, API latency (%{time_total}), and the UptimeRobot monitor URL.
Actual HTTP status of /, /admin, /admin/invoices recorded and explained against the access gate (redirect to /access is the healthy result for cookieless requests, per middleware.ts:32-49).
API latency measured with curl -w %{time_total} for at least one endpoint and recorded against the < 500ms target.
Console-error sweep of /admin and /admin/invoices documented: either the gate-passing path (ADMIN_ACCESS_CODE at /access, env var name only) or actual browser console output.
tasks.action: Run curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code} %{time_total}' against /, /admin, /admin/invoices and /access; annotate each protected-route result with the middleware gate logic so redirects read as healthy. Record the UptimeRobot monitor URL. Document the console-sweep gate-passing procedure (env var names only). Add a Deploy verdict line.

tasks.title: Author the human-run WhatsApp regression checklists (property upload + invoice lifecycle)
acceptance_criteria: docs/admin/phase-3-regression-checklist.md exists with sections A. Property-upload regression and B. Invoice-lifecycle regression.
Section A walks WhatsApp to draft to Zyprus with expected replies and DB checks (listing_uploads, chat_history on vceeheaxcrhmpqueudqx), naming the region restriction and min-1-image rule.

Section B covers create_draft, approve (two-step), mark_paid/issue_receipt, issue_credit_note (two-step), and PDF delivery, each with phrase, expected reply, and the invoice-DB table to inspect on tijadsdysuxkxrpdlecq.
Allowlist precondition (Fawzi/Marios/Charalambos, last-8 match) and links to the three Phase-2 docs present; every step is a checkbox with Expected and Verify-in-DB lines; no secret values.
tasks.action: Build Section B from the runbook intent table (invoicing-runbook.md:228-247) and lifecycle section (149-217); build Section A from CLAUDE.md Property Uploads + README-UPLOADS.md. Add an Automated coverage preamble linking the Task 1/Task 2 reports and an allowlist + two-Supabase-project preconditions block linking the Phase-2 docs.
